_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Headache Log

app.name: Headache Log
app.description: Offline Headache and Migraine Log Tracker. Track headache severity, symptoms, activities, and medication logs in one place.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Track headache frequency, symptoms, pain scale, and medication offline.
features: Log headache start time, duration, and pain scale levels easily
Track associated symptoms, activities, food/water intake, and triggers
Maintain detailed medication logs and export comprehensive health reports

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your records and reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local log files, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Headache Log (Mobile)
mobile.description: Headache and medication tracking sheets optimized for mobile layouts.

tablet.name: Headache Log (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive headache and medication tracking sheets optimized for tablets.

desktop.name: Headache Log (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive headache and medication tracking sheets optimized for desktop.

pdf.shareSubject: Here is your Headache Log Report
pdf.shareText: Headache Log PDF report generated successfully
pdf.csvShareText: Headache Log data exported as CSV

menu.emailSubject: Here is your Headache Log Report

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Headache Log needs access to your camera to capture medical records or notes.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Headache Log needs access to your photo library to attach medical images.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Headache Log needs microphone access when using the camera.
